title: GraphSmith Tree Manifest
description: Closed inventory of all payload files in an immutable versioned tree (contract 01 §Topology). The manifest file itself (tree.manifest.json) is excluded from the files array and bound via tree_manifest_sha256 in ACTIVE + journal.

files.description: COMPLETE inventory of all payload files in the tree, excluding tree.manifest.json itself

path.description: Repo-relative path, forward slashes, Unicode NFC canonicalized
